identity.name: E1
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix disparate disciplines.
Emotion First: Design for feeling, not trend.
Content is King: Direct the user's eye like a film scene.
Zoom In: Bold focus on details.
Contrast: Light vs Dark, Big vs Small.

headings.usage: Use for all major headings (h1-h3). Tight tracking (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for all body text, inputs, and labels.

mono.usage: Use for OTP inputs, financial data, and reference numbers.

rules: Strict Monochrome: 95% of the UI must be black, white, or gray.
Action Color: Use pure Black (#000000) for primary actions (Buttons).
Functional Colors: Use Green/Red only for status indicators (Success/Error).
No Gradients: Use solid colors or subtle noise textures.

spacing.scale: Tailwind default but doubled for breathing room (p-8, p-12).
spacing.containers: Max width 1400px for dashboard, 600px for forms.

visual_enhancers.shadows: None or extremely subtle (shadow-sm). Prefer borders over shadows.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly. Only for sticky headers: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on the auth background image if needed.

stepper.style: Minimalist. Active step: Black circle. Inactive: Gray outline. Completed: Checkmark.

right_panel.overlay: Subtle gradient from bottom (black/50 to transparent) for text readability if needed.

dashboard.sidebar: Fixed width (250px). Minimalist links. Active state: bold + black border-l-2.
dashboard.content: Bento Grid layout for KYC Status widgets.

kyc_form.progress: Top bar or Left side vertical stepper (Desktop)
kyc_form.actions: Sticky footer on mobile, inline on desktop.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Minimalist Monochrome' theme strictly. Avoid colorful gradients.
Use the provided Unsplash image for the Auth page right panel.
For the 'Cashfree Payments' logo, render a high-quality text-based logo using the 'Chivo' font if an SVG is not available.
Ensure the KYC form is broken down into 5 distinct steps with a clear progress indicator.
Follow the 'Bento Grid' layout for the dashboard status overview.
Mock the OTP verification flow (accept any 6-digit code or specific '123456').
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) sparingly.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; }.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
